title: Better Environment
body:
# Better Environment

Make the environment in Minecraft better.

## Features

- Round sun
- Real life pixelated images of the moon phases (thanks NASA)
- Shadowed clouds




## Installation

It's easy to install as 5 steps:

- Download the latest release
- Go to the Minecraft folder
  - Mac: `~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/`
  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\.minecraft`
  - Linux: `~/.minecraft`
- Open the `resourcepacks` folder
- Drag and drop (or copy) the `.zip` file there
- Unpack the `.zip` file there.
